summary: TD Cowen cut price target from $214 to $204 on April 16, 2026, maintaining Hold. Scotiabank upgraded CVX to Hold on March 27, 2026. Overall 42 analysts: 17 Buy, 7 Hold, 2 Sell. Buy consensus from 20 analysts as of May 1, 2026. Avg price target ~$191.8-$212.
